mapper.select: SELECT MAX(unique_id) FROM ietm_icn_manage WHERE cmnode_id = #{cmnodeId} AND isdeleted = '0'

SELECT icn.id, icn.create_by, icn.create_time, icn.update_by, icn.update_time, icn.cmnode_id, icn.sns, icn.rpc, icn.rpc_name, icn.originator, icn.originator_name, icn.unique_id, icn.variant_code, icn.issue_no, icn.security_classification, icn.security, icn.icn_type, icn.ispublished, icn.isdeleted, icn.version, icn.org_identity, icn.icn, att1.id as "ietmAttachment.id", att1.file_name as "ietmAttachment.fileName", att1.file_size as "ietmAttachment.fileSize", att1.file_key as "ietmAttachment.fileKey", att2.id as "relatedIetmAttachment.id", att2.file_name as "relatedIetmAttachment.fileName", att2.file_key as "relatedIetmAttachment.fileKey" FROM ietm_icn_manage icn LEFT JOIN ietm_attachment att1 ON icn.id = att1.pid AND att1.file_type = '实体文件' LEFT JOIN ietm_attachment att2 ON icn.id = att2.pid AND att2.file_type = '相关文件' WHERE icn.cmnode_id = #{cmnodeId} AND icn.isdeleted = '0' ORDER BY icn.create_time DESC

SELECT icn.id, icn.create_by, icn.create_time, icn.update_by, icn.update_time, icn.cmnode_id, icn.sns, icn.rpc, icn.rpc_name, icn.originator, icn.originator_name, icn.unique_id, icn.variant_code, icn.issue_no, icn.security_classification, icn.security, icn.icn_type, icn.ispublished, icn.isdeleted, icn.version, icn.org_identity, icn.icn, att1.id as "ietmAttachment.id", att1.file_name as "ietmAttachment.fileName", att1.file_size as "ietmAttachment.fileSize", att1.file_key as "ietmAttachment.fileKey", att2.id as "relatedIetmAttachment.id", att2.file_name as "relatedIetmAttachment.fileName", att2.file_key as "relatedIetmAttachment.fileKey" FROM ietm_icn_manage icn LEFT JOIN ietm_attachment att1 ON icn.id = att1.pid AND att1.file_type = '实体文件' LEFT JOIN ietm_attachment att2 ON icn.id = att2.pid AND att2.file_type = '相关文件' WHERE icn.cmnode_id IN ( SELECT id FROM ietm_project_configuration_management START WITH id = #{cmnodeId} CONNECT BY PRIOR id = pid ) AND icn.isdeleted = '0' ORDER BY icn.create_time DESC

SELECT icn.id, icn.create_by, icn.create_time, icn.update_by, icn.update_time, icn.cmnode_id, icn.sns, icn.rpc, icn.rpc_name, icn.originator, icn.originator_name, icn.unique_id, icn.variant_code, icn.issue_no, icn.security_classification, icn.security, icn.icn_type, icn.ispublished, icn.isdeleted, icn.version, icn.org_identity, icn.icn, att.id as "ietmAttachment.id", att.file_name as "ietmAttachment.fileName", att.file_size as "ietmAttachment.fileSize", att.file_key as "ietmAttachment.fileKey", att.file_type as "ietmAttachment.fileType", att.file_prop as "ietmAttachment.fileProp" FROM ietm_icn_manage icn LEFT JOIN ietm_attachment att ON icn.id = att.pid AND att.file_type = '实体文件' WHERE icn.id = #{id} AND icn.isdeleted = '0'

SELECT icn.id, icn.icn, icn.issue_no, icn.create_time, att.file_name as fileName, att.file_type as fileType FROM ietm_icn_reference icn_ref INNER JOIN ietm_icn_manage icn ON icn_ref.target_icn_id = icn.id LEFT JOIN ietm_attachment att ON icn.id = att.pid AND att.file_type = '实体文件' WHERE icn_ref.source_icn_id = #{icnId} AND icn_ref.reference_type = 'ICN_TO_ICN' AND icn.isdeleted = '0' ORDER BY icn_ref.create_time DESC

SELECT icn.id, icn.icn, icn.issue_no, icn.create_time, att.file_name as fileName, att.file_type as fileType FROM ietm_icn_reference icn_ref INNER JOIN ietm_icn_manage icn ON icn_ref.source_icn_id = icn.id LEFT JOIN ietm_attachment att ON icn.id = att.pid AND att.file_type = '实体文件' WHERE icn_ref.target_icn_id = #{icnId} AND icn_ref.reference_type = 'ICN_TO_ICN' AND icn.isdeleted = '0' ORDER BY icn_ref.create_time DESC

SELECT icn_ref.id, icn_ref.dm_code, icn_ref.create_time, icn_ref.remark, dm.tech_name as dm_title, dm.info_name, dm.dm_type, dm.version as issue_no FROM ietm_icn_reference icn_ref LEFT JOIN ietm_data_module dm ON icn_ref.dm_code = dm.dmc WHERE icn_ref.source_icn_id = #{icnId} AND icn_ref.reference_type = 'ICN_TO_DM' ORDER BY icn_ref.create_time DESC

SELECT icn.id, icn.icn, icn.issue_no, icn.icn_type, att.id as "ietmAttachment.id", att.file_name as "ietmAttachment.fileName", att.file_size as "ietmAttachment.fileSize", att.file_key as "ietmAttachment.fileKey", att.file_type as "ietmAttachment.fileType" FROM ietm_icn_manage icn LEFT JOIN ietm_attachment att ON icn.id = att.pid
icn.id IN
#{id}
AND icn.isdeleted = '0'
AND att.file_type = '实体文件'
ORDER BY icn.create_time DESC
